dataset/redundancy:
* **Redundancy Methodology**: Not enough information is available.

* **Independent Sets**: No. The paper does not impose a systematic methodology of the available literature, which may introduce selection bias. Additionally, most of the studies cited were retrospective and did not include any randomized controlled studies. Furthermore, the definition of preoperative opioid use varied between studies and many relied on self-reporting opioid use data.
